basics.name: MaLik Manan
basics.title: Creative Web Designer | Front-End Developer | Full Stack Developer
basics.summary: I am currently pursuing a Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science from NFC IET Multan. Alongside my studies, I am working as a Front-End Developer, where I focus on web designing and creating user-friendly interfaces. With over 4 years of hands-on experience in React, Vue.js, Node.js, HTML, CSS, Bootstrap, JavaScript, and jQuery, I have developed a strong understanding of responsive and modern web design. Passionate about clean design and smooth user experiences, I’m always eager to learn new technologies and grow as a developer.

bullets: Design responsive websites using React, Node.js, HTML, CSS, Bootstrap, and jQuery
Create clean and user-friendly UI layouts
Work with the team to implement design ideas
Update and maintain existing web pages

achievements.item: 4+ years of hands-on experience in modern web technologies
achievements.context: Professional development experience with React, Vue.js, Node.js, HTML, CSS, and modern frameworks
Consistent professional growth and contribution in a full-stack role at Resonant Solutions since 2022.

extra: Passionate about clean design and smooth user experiences
Eager to learn new technologies and grow as a developer
